sourcesContent:
// Mock data para Melfry Auto Gallery SRL

export const featuredVehicles = [
  {
    id: 1,
    brand: "Tesla",
    model: "Model Y",
    year: 2022,
    price: "$45,000",
    image: "https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_7865380e-3d1a-4fd9-890c-028532ccbd66/artifacts/99asfes7_Tesla%20Model%20Y%20Standard%20%E2%9C%85Bater%C3%ADa%20de%2080%20kWh%20%E2%9C%85Autonom%C3%ADa%20420%20kms.%20%E2%9C%85Potencia%20total%20351%20HP%E2%9C%85Par%20el%C3%A9ctri.jpg",
    category: "Eléctrico",
    transmission: "Automática",
    mileage: "15,000 km",
    specs: [
      "Batería de 80 kWh",
      "Autonomía 420 kms",
      "Potencia total 351 HP",
      "Carga rápida"
    ],
    featured: true
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    brand: "Toyota",
    model: "Highlander XSE",
    year: 2021,
    price: "$38,500",
    image: "https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_7865380e-3d1a-4fd9-890c-028532ccbd66/artifacts/u3yrb78x_Toyota%20Highlander%20XSE%202021Estilo%20deportivo%20y%20elegante%20Recien%20importada%20de%20USA%20Clean%20Carfax%204%2C500.jpg",
    category: "SUV",
    transmission: "Automática",
    mileage: "4,500 km",
    specs: [
      "Estilo deportivo y elegante",
      "Recién importada de USA",
      "Clean Carfax",
      "7 pasajeros"
    ],
    featured: true
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    brand: "Suzuki",
    model: "Swift",
    year: 2019,
    price: "$12,800",
    image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/337909/pexels-photo-337909.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940",
    category: "Compacto",
    transmission: "Automática",
    mileage: "45,000 km",
    specs: [
      "Sistema Eco",
      "Aire digital",
      "Cristales eléctricos",
      "Excelente consumo"
    ],
    featured: true
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    brand: "Honda",
    model: "Fit",
    year: 2019,
    price: "$13,500",
    image: "https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_7865380e-3d1a-4fd9-890c-028532ccbd66/artifacts/90omonnl_Honda%20Fit%202019%E2%9C%85Reci%C3%A9n%20importada%E2%9C%85Asientos%20en%20tela%E2%9C%85Sistema%20Eco%E2%9C%85Aire%20digital%E2%9C%85Cristales%20El%C3%A9ctricos%E2%9C%85R.jpg",
    category: "Compacto",
    transmission: "Automática",
    mileage: "38,000 km",
    specs: [
      "Recién importada",
      "Asientos en tela",
      "Sistema Eco",
      "Aire digital"
    ],
    featured: true
  },
  {
    id: 5,
    brand: "BMW",
    model: "X5",
    year: 2020,
    price: "$52,000",
    image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/6732612/pexels-photo-6732612.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940",
    category: "SUV",
    transmission: "Automática",
    mileage: "28,000 km",
    specs: [
      "Motor V8",
      "Cuero premium",
      "Techo panorámico",
      "Sistema de sonido premium"
    ],
    featured: false
  },
  {
    id: 6,
    brand: "Mercedes-Benz",
    model: "C-Class",
    year: 2021,
    price: "$42,000",
    image: "https://images.pexels.com/photos/3894049/pexels-photo-3894049.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&dpr=2&h=650&w=940",
    category: "Sedán",
    transmission: "Automática",
    mileage: "18,000 km",
    specs: [
      "Motor turbo",
      "Interior de lujo",
      "Sistema de navegación",
      "Cámara 360°"
    ],
    featured: true
  }
];

export const testimonials = [
  {
    id: 1,
    name: "María González",
    rating: 5,
    text: "Excelente atención y buen trato, me siento complacida.",
    image: "https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_7865380e-3d1a-4fd9-890c-028532ccbd66/artifacts/s3up0m94_Este%20veh%C3%ADculo%20marca%20el%20inicio%20de%20un%20camino%20lleno%20de%20bendiciones.%20%F0%9F%99%8F%F0%9F%9A%97%20Agradecemos%20sinceramente%20s.jpg"
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    name: "Carlos Rodríguez",
    rating: 5,
    text: "Buen negocio, muy buen trato ❤️",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1507003211169-0a1dd7228f2d?w=150&h=150&fit=crop"
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    name: "Ana Martínez",
    rating: 5,
    text: "Un lugar donde te sientes bienvenido desde el primer momento. Servicio excepcional.",
    image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1438761681033-6461ffad8d80?w=150&h=150&fit=crop"
  }
];

export const whyChooseUs = [
  {
    id: 1,
    title: "Servicio Confiable",
    description: "Más de 10 años brindando un servicio honesto y transparente a nuestros clientes.",
    icon: "shield-check"
  },
  {
    id: 2,
    title: "Vehículos de Calidad",
    description: "Cada vehículo es inspeccionado cuidadosamente para garantizar la mejor calidad.",
    icon: "car"
  },
  {
    id: 3,
    title: "Negociaciones Transparentes",
    description: "Sin sorpresas ni cargos ocultos. Todo claro desde el principio.",
    icon: "file-text"
  },
  {
    id: 4,
    title: "Satisfacción del Cliente",
    description: "Tu felicidad es nuestra prioridad. Hacemos todo lo posible para que te sientas satisfecho.",
    icon: "heart"
  }
];

export const teamImage = "https://customer-assets.emergentagent.com/job_7865380e-3d1a-4fd9-890c-028532ccbd66/artifacts/djare52s_Gemini_Generated_Image_of5r3qof5r3qof5r%281%29.png";

export const contactInfo = {
  phone: "809-245-7000",
  whatsapp: "18092457000",
  address: "Av. Jacobo Majluta #71, Santo Domingo Norte, Marañón 11",
  hours: "Lunes - Sábado: 8:00 AM - 6:30 PM",
  email: "info@melfryautogallery.com",
  instagram: "@melfryautogallery",
  mapUrl: "https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d3783.8977!2d-69.9124!3d18.5203!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x0%3A0x0!2zMTjCsDMxJzEzLjEiTiA2OcKwNTQnNDQuNiJX!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sdo!4v1234567890"
};

export const categories = [
  "Todos",
  "SUV",
  "Sedán",
  "Compacto",
  "Eléctrico",
  "Deportivo"
];
